betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Structuralduct & Covers§f

§aHide duct networks inside decorative blocks for a clean base aesthetic!§f

§bStructuralducts§f are decorative blocks that connect to most other ducts. They serve no transfer function but are the crafting base for §bCovers§f.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Structuralduct§f: §e2× Iron Nugget§f + §e1× Lead Ingot§f → §e6× Structuralduct§f.
§b• Covers§f (shapeless): §e1× Structuralduct§f + §e1× any block§f → §e6× Covers§f.

§6Covers§f:
§bCovers§f are installed on any duct side to make it look like a full block. Covers do not affect duct functionality — ducts passing through them create a hole automatically.

Available cover materials include: Stone, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Grass, Dirt, Cobblestone, all Wood Planks, Sandstone, Nether Brick, Obsidian, Moss Stone, Bricks, Polished variants, End Stone Bricks.

§eTip§f: Use covers to hide transport networks inside your base's wall material. The covered duct still functions normally but is visually indistinguishable from a solid block.
